title: Campaign
description: A notification campaign consisting of a sequence of related messages with a shared engagement purpose.

purpose.description: Detailed explanation of the campaign's goal, target outcome, and why it matters for retention. Should be at least a sentence or two.

cancelConditions.description: Events that stop the campaign. Every campaign must have at least one cancel condition.

existingNotificationReferences.description: IDs of existing notifications incorporated into this campaign. Omit or empty array if none.

designNotes.description: Overall strategy notes explaining why this campaign is designed this way.

description.description: Who receives this campaign (e.g., 'New users who signed up but haven't completed their first workout').

triggerEvent.description: Snake_case event name that starts this campaign (e.g., 'user_signup_completed').

entryCondition.description: Boolean condition that must be true to enter the campaign (e.g., 'totalWorkouts == 0').

event.description: Snake_case event name that cancels the campaign.

description.description: Why this event should cancel the campaign.

title.description: Notification title. Must be glanceable — under 35 characters, no truncation. May include {variables}.

body.description: Notification body. Compact and punchy — under 90 characters. May include {variables}.

personalizationVariables.description: List of variable keys used in this message's title or body. Empty array if none (but try to personalize).

rationale.description: Why this message exists, why this timing, why this wording. Must provide meaningful reasoning.

type.description: 'delay_from_event' for the first message (delay after a specific event), 'delay_from_previous' for subsequent messages (delay after the prior message).

event.description: The triggering event name. Required when type is 'delay_from_event', must be omitted when type is 'delay_from_previous'.

delay.description: Duration shorthand: '30m' (minutes), '2h' (hours), '1d' (days). Must match pattern like '30m', '2h', '48h', '3d'.

description.description: Human-readable explanation of the timing logic and reasoning.

startHour.description: Earliest delivery hour in local time (0–23).

endHour.description: Latest delivery hour in local time (0–23). Must be greater than startHour.

description.description: Explanation of why this delivery window was chosen.
